name: Banners
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can display targeted banners in search results or collection pages based on specific queries or categories, enabling contextual promotional messaging that aligns with customer search intent."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This capability helps you promote relevant sales, highlight featured categories, or communicate important information at moments when customers are actively engaged in product discovery-potentially improving promotional effectiveness and conversion through timely, relevant messaging."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Configuring banner campaigns helps you deliver strategic visual communication within the search and browsing experience. You can set up query-specific or collection-specific banners with targeted messaging, control timing and frequency, and measure banner performance-enabling data-driven promotional strategies that complement search personalization while maintaining focus on products, supporting both brand communication and the conversion-oriented experience customers expect."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "What are Banners?"}], "data-id": "what-are-banners"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Banners are promotional graphics or images that appear on an ecommerce website driving shoppers towards a specific brand, product, or range."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XLEJYF03DOUC/4db9f0c-banners.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/XLEJYF03DOUC/4db9f0c-banners.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "4db9f0c-Banners.png", "width": 1914, "height": 960}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "How to Set Up Banners"}], "data-id": "how-to-set-up-banners"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Go to the Merchant Dashboard and navigate to 'Search > Banners'."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Click on the blue button on the top right of the screen that says 'Create New'."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Next, you will be prompted to name your banner, if you wish, for internal purposes. Then you can upload the image which is to become your banner."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Thirdly, you define what search terms you want to lead to this banner, and then you are given the option to include a link. This means that every time a shopper clicks on the link, they are brought to a predefined address. This can be to a blog post, or a smart collection, a search results page, or any other page the merchant desires."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ANY5UD3EACH1/675c81d-banner-creation.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/ANY5UD3EACH1/675c81d-banner-creation.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "675c81d-Banner_creation_.png", "width": 1916, "height": 962}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Why Are Banners Useful?"}], "data-id": "why-are-banners-useful"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The main reason merchants create banners for search terms is because shoppers who search have a very high level of intent and merchants want to capture this - and capitalize on it."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Let's say, for example, you're a shop that sells gaming equipment. A shopper goes to your site and types in Pokemon, looking for Pokemon playing cards."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "That indicates a very high level of intent. The shopper is essentially coming into your store and telling your sales person: \"Hey, I want to buy Pokemon cards\"."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A merchant can target this intent and create banners, or informational images, to help these customers purchase a brand, a product, or a range they would like to promote."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In this case, perhaps it's a curated range of Pokemon cards, or it could be a sale on a particular item or collection."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/74WUR8CR1DB0/5737768-inked-gaming-banner.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/74WUR8CR1DB0/5737768-inked-gaming-banner.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "5737768-inked-gaming-banner.png", "width": 1100, "height": 562}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "An example of a banner in action on client Inked Gaming's site.", "italic": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "How to add a Banner to a Zero Results Page"}], "data-id": "how-to-add-a-banner-to-a-zero-results-page"}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Components: "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://github.com/findify/findify-js/blob/develop/packages/react-components/src/components/Banner/index.ts", "children": [{"text": "components/Banner/index.ts"}]}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In order to make banners appears on the zero results page, you need to edit 'components/Banner/index.ts' component:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "TypeScript:"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "/** * @module components /Banner */import React from 'react';import { connectBanner } from '@findify /react-connect';import { compose, setDisplayName, withPropsOnChange } from 'recompose';import withTheme from 'helpers/withTheme';import view from 'components/Banner/view';import styles from 'components/Banner/styles.css';export default compose(  setDisplayName('Banner'),  withTheme(styles),  connectBanner,  // we need to add this withPropsOnChange handler  withPropsOnChange(['banner'], ({ banner }) => {    if (banner) {      return banner;    }    const searchWidget = window.findify.widgets.findByType('search')[0];    return {      banner: searchWidget && searchWidget.agent.response.get('banner')    }  }))(view);"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
